name: @dustinbyrne/kb
description_en: An automated Kanban board for [pi](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono). You (or an agent) add high level ideas to your task list, and a team of agents execute them using worktrees.
description_zh: [pi](https://github.com/badlogic/pi-mono) 的自动化看板。您（或代理）将高级想法添加到任务列表，然后一组代理使用工作树执行它们
